   ]

     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "lal.MSUN_SI != Msun\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore', 'Wswiglal-redir-stdio')\n",
    "\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from gwGenealogy.binaries import sample_gwtc_population, available_catalogs\n",
    "from gwGenealogy.utils import set_rcparams, compute_jensen_shannon_divergence\n",
    "\n",
    "set_rcparams()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cbb6bd93",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [

    "## Sample from GWTC-5 default model"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "354e9851",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-08T22:35:43.478589Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-08T22:35:43.478513Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-08T22:35:46.019104Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-08T22:35:46.018600Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Keys: ['mass_1', 'mass_2', 'q', 'small_q', 'a1', 'a2', 'cos_theta1', 'cos_theta2', 'theta1', 'theta2', 'redshift', 'chi_eff', 'chi_p', 'hyper_draw_index']\n",
      "Number of samples: 50000\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "pop = sample_gwtc_population(n_samples=50000, catalog='gwtc5', source='posterior', seed=42)\n",
    "print(f\"Keys: {list(pop.keys())}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Number of samples: {len(pop['mass_1'])}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "5d48259c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Mass and spin distributions"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "41b23496",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-08T22:35:46.020329Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-08T22:35:46.020246Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-08T22:35:46.657656Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-08T22:35:46.656934Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x1000 with 4 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(12, 10))\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[0, 0].hist(pop['mass_1'], bins=np.logspace(np.log10(2), np.log10(200), 60), density=True, histtype='step', lw=2)\n",
    "axes[0, 0].set_xlabel(r'$m_1$ [$M_\\odot$]')\n",
    "axes[0, 0].set_ylabel('Density')\n",
    "axes[0, 0].set_xscale('log')\n",
    "axes[0, 0].set_title('Primary mass')\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[0, 1].hist(pop['small_q'], bins=60, density=True, histtype='step', lw=2)\n",
    "axes[0, 1].set_xlabel(r'$q = m_2/m_1$')\n",
    "axes[0, 1].set_ylabel('Density')\n",
    "axes[0, 1].set_title('Mass ratio')\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[1, 0].hist(pop['a1'], bins=60, density=True, histtype='step', lw=2)\n",
    "axes[1, 0].set_xlabel(r'$a_1$')\n",
    "axes[1, 0].set_ylabel('Density')\n",
    "axes[1, 0].set_title('Primary spin magnitude')\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[1, 1].hist(pop['chi_eff'], bins=60, density=True, histtype='step', lw=2)\n",
    "axes[1, 1].set_xlabel(r'$\\chi_{\\rm eff}$')\n",
    "axes[1, 1].set_ylabel('Density')\n",
    "axes[1, 1].set_title('Effective spin')\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "4ea3e137",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## GWTC-3 vs GWTC-5 comparison"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "374b6742",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-08T22:35:46.659163Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-08T22:35:46.659045Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-08T22:35:57.693582Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-08T22:35:57.693188Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x500 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "JSD(m1):      0.065258\n",
      "JSD(chi_eff): 0.004499\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "pop_gwtc3 = sample_gwtc_population(n_samples=10000, catalog='gwtc3', source='posterior', seed=100)\n",
    "pop_gwtc5 = sample_gwtc_population(n_samples=10000, catalog='gwtc5', source='posterior', seed=101)\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 5))\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[0].hist(pop_gwtc3['mass_1'], bins=np.logspace(np.log10(2), np.log10(200), 60), density=True, histtype='step', lw=2, label='GWTC-3')\n",
    "axes[0].hist(pop_gwtc5['mass_1'], bins=np.logspace(np.log10(2), np.log10(200), 60), density=True, histtype='step', lw=2, label='GWTC-5')\n",
    "axes[0].set_xscale('log')\n",
    "axes[0].set_xlabel(r'$m_1$ [$M_\\odot$]')\n",
    "axes[0].set_ylabel('Density')\n",
    "axes[0].legend()\n",
    "axes[0].set_title('Primary mass')\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[1].hist(pop_gwtc3['chi_eff'], bins=60, density=True, histtype='step', lw=2, label='GWTC-3')\n",
    "axes[1].hist(pop_gwtc5['chi_eff'], bins=60, density=True, histtype='step', lw=2, label='GWTC-5')\n",
    "axes[1].set_xlabel(r'$\\chi_{\\rm eff}$')\n",
    "axes[1].set_ylabel('Density')\n",
    "axes[1].legend()\n",
    "axes[1].set_title('Effective spin')\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "jsd_m1 = compute_jensen_shannon_divergence(pop_gwtc3['mass_1'], pop_gwtc5['mass_1'])\n",
    "jsd_chi = compute_jensen_shannon_divergence(pop_gwtc3['chi_eff'], pop_gwtc5['chi_eff'])\n",
    "print(f\"JSD(m1):      {jsd_m1:.6f}\")\n",
    "print(f\"JSD(chi_eff): {jsd_chi:.6f}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "30b413f5",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Posterior vs prior predictive"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "056a96d4",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-08T22:35:57.694838Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-08T22:35:57.694762Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-08T22:36:11.726478Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-08T22:36:11.725877Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "JSD(m1, posterior vs prior): 0.243331\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "pop_posterior = sample_gwtc_population(n_samples=10000, catalog='gwtc5', source='posterior', seed=200)\n",
    "pop_prior = sample_gwtc_population(n_samples=10000, catalog='gwtc5', source='prior', seed=201)\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 5))\n",
    "ax.hist(pop_posterior['mass_1'], bins=np.logspace(np.log10(2), np.log10(200), 60), density=True, histtype='step', lw=2, label='Posterior')\n",
    "ax.hist(pop_prior['mass_1'], bins=np.logspace(np.log10(2), np.log10(200), 60), density=True, histtype='step', lw=2, label='Prior')\n",
    "ax.set_xscale('log')\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(r'$m_1$ [$M_\\odot$]')\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel('Density')\n",
    "ax.legend()\n",
    "ax.set_title('GWTC-5: Posterior vs Prior predictive')\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "jsd_m1_pp = compute_jensen_shannon_divergence(pop_posterior['mass_1'], pop_prior['mass_1'])\n",
    "print(f\"JSD(m1, posterior vs prior): {jsd_m1_pp:.6f}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "49cae015",
   "metadata": {},

   "outputs": [

     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [

      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 5))\n",
    "ax.hist(pop['redshift'], bins=60, density=True, histtype='step', lw=2)\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel('Redshift $z$')\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel('Density')\n",
    "ax.set_title('GWTC-5 redshift distribution')\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
